testimonials.message: He fixed a lot of major bugs in our game, and it was all a success. He also made the coding so much easier to edit. He’s really awesome at making AI, and I wouldn’t even have a proper boss fight minigame if he didn’t step up.
He clutched up my game's update a day before release and did it flawlessly, wouldn't have been as good of a release if wasn't for him.
lightwin helped alot with bug fixing and additiong additional features and qol to existing systems in da game

Lighty helped start my game up, if it wasn't for him, the game would've just never happened. Every crazy idea I had, he somehow knew what I was getting across and worked on it. Lighty's really good for speed too, I'm honestly glad i met the guy. Absolute life saver
Active and constantly sends update about his work. Never delays the tasks given and gets things done fast. If y'all are searching a fast and effective programmer he's the one.
